description: An annuity owner wants to transfer ownership of their non-qualified annuity to their child.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and verify their request.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the customer and contract.

nodes.task_description: Explain that changing ownership is a taxable event for the original owner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the tax consequences of the transfer.

nodes.task_description: Provide the correct forms to complete the ownership change.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the required legal forms to the customer.
